- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Next.js project requested in the current workspace.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project scaffolded directly in the current directory with Next.js, TypeScript, App Router, ESLint, and Tailwind CSS 4.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Initial homepage customized as a minimal starter screen.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No required extensions were specified by project setup.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed and `npm run build` passes successfully.

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	Create a VS Code task for project validation or development workflow if needed.

- [ ] Launch the Project
	Ask for confirmation before starting a debug or dev session.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	This file has been cleaned up and the project README is kept up to date.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
